A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a news article referenced by an embedded link in a social media post
An Object that represents a news media outlet or website that publishes articles
A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a Bluesky post sharing energy content

A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a curated Bluesky feed for energy content
An Object that represents a company agency or institutional body mentioned in energy news
